title.en: Shi Mu Tianzu waved his hand, and a set of data...

content.en:
"I heard that!" Mihai Heavenly Ancestor nodded slightly, "The race where the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is located is called the Human Race, which is a very ordinary humanoid race. Before, there were no strong people in the human race, and there weren't even many great ancestors, so we naturally didn't care about this small race. But recently, many fifth-stage ancestors of the human race have broken into the territorial waters of the Ten Thousand Dragons, and there have even been many invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors. After I learned a little bit about it, I was shocked. There are too many Great Ancestors of the Human Race now, it's just terrifying!"

"I made a simple statistic!"

Shi Mu Tianzu waved his hand, and a set of data emerged.

"At present, in addition to the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the Human Race also has a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, there are about more than a thousand Invincible-level Fifth Stage Great Ancestors, the number of Fifth Stage Great Ancestors is about tens of thousands, and the number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms has reached tens of millions, and the number of ordinary Great Ancestors is in hundreds of millions. "

The number of Great Ancestors in the unit of 100 million, this is amazing.

A realm like the Xuanqi Realm has several Heavenly Ancestors, which is already quite good, but the number of Great Ancestors is far from 100 million!

And the number of great ancestors of the human race is in the unit of 100 million, not only 100 million, and its number is so large that it is difficult to count.

The Winter Heavenly Ancestor added: "According to our understanding, the first year of the billions of realms, there were only a few great ancestors of the human race, and the human race only rose recently. At this rate, the human race is afraid that many Heavenly Ancestors will be born in the near future. At that time, the most powerful strength in the Wanlong territorial waters will be the human race!"

"It is said that there are seas of gold liquid energy within the human race, and it is precisely because of the sea of gold liquid energy that the human race rises. The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor guessed, "This golden liquid energy sea should be an opportunity that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor obtained from the territorial sea boundary rift, other than that, I can't imagine where there would be such an opportunity in the Wanlong territorial waters." "

"Territorial sea boundary crack!"

They also speculated that it was the reason.

If it weren't for the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor itself was a Boundary-Breaking Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor, how could he have broken through to the Blood Transformation Realm so quickly and developed the Terran to this extent.

Therefore, they guessed that Endless Heavenly Ancestor Ye Tian must have obtained a great opportunity in the territorial sea boundary seam!

They want such a big opportunity!

"Let's go, let's go find the Endless Heavenly Ancestor and buy some golden liquid energy sea!" the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor proposed.

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor frowned and said, "Will the Endless Heavenly Ancestor be willing to trade it to us?" Although that golden liquid energy sea is useless to us, it is too valuable for a force or a race, and he is afraid that he will not trade it to us!"

Shi Mu Heavenly Ancestor said: "That's not necessarily, we are also five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, even if the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is not happy, you have to give us some face, and give us a little trade." Once the deal is in hand, we can do our own research. "

"Okay, then let's visit the Endless Heavenly Ancestor now!"

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor agreed.

......

Silent Black Sea.

When the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor and the Mihai Heavenly Ancestor came to visit, the Great Ancestor of the Human Race immediately took them and informed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also saw these Heavenly Ancestors, after all, they were Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, so they had to give a little face.

As a representative, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor spoke: "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, we have come to visit the Endless Heavenly Ancestor this time to make a deal. "

"Deal?

Ye Tian asked.

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said: "I heard that the human race has a sea of gold liquid energy, and I am a little curious about it, so I want to buy some, I don't know if it is possible?"

"Sea of Liquid Gold Energy!"

Ye Tian didn't expect the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor to fight this idea.

Obviously, the sea of golden liquid energy formed by the golden muscle fluid still aroused the greed of these Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, after all, in a short period of time, the bloodline of the human race was transformed, and one by one they easily became Great Ancestors, and even gave birth to a large number of Fifth Stage Great Ancestors.

At this rate, many Heavenly Ancestors can definitely be born in the future.

Any force that wants to give birth to more Heavenly Ancestors, in that case, the force itself will become stronger and stronger.

Therefore, this terrifying increase rate of the human race naturally caused the greed of these Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

If the force they are in has cultivated a lot of Heavenly Ancestors, they can even join forces to enter the territorial waters to explore in the future, which will only be good for themselves, not harmful.

Of course, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor must have wanted to know where he got the opportunity from even more in their hearts.

"Heavenly Ancestors, the Golden Liquid Energy Sea is the foundation of our human race, and it is impossible to sell it!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

At this time, the faces of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestors were a little ugly, Ye Tian refused too quickly, he didn't think about it at all, and he didn't have any tactful words.

"It's just a little bit of gold liquid energy sea, it doesn't affect the development of the human race!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor continued.

"I said, I won't trade, if a few people are here just for this, then please go back!" Ye Tian began to drive people directly.

"Then I'll take my leave!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor and they chose to leave.

......

The immeasurable ruins beyond the silent Black Sea.

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor and the others were extremely angry at this moment.

"This Endless Heavenly Ancestor is too much, he just traded a little bit of the Golden Liquid Energy Sea, and he actually refused directly!" said the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor angrily.

"Yes, it doesn't give us face at all!" Shi Mu Heavenly Ancestor was also very angry, "Isn't he just breaking through to the Blood Transformation Realm, in the history of the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea, he is not the only Heavenly Ancestor who has become a Blood Transformation Realm at the Boundary Breaking Level, do you really think that he is now invincible in the Blood Transformation Realm of the Ten Thousand Dragons' Territorial Seas?"

"Let's talk about it later!"

Several Heavenly Ancestors left here.

When they got back, they met again.

"What now?" asked the Stone Mother Heavenly Ancestor.

"Steal the sea of gold liquid energy!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor proposed.

"This ......" Mihai Heavenly Ancestor instigated them.

After all, Ye Tian's strength was too strong, and when he was at the peak of the Fusion Realm, his combat power was much stronger than that of an ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Now that Ye Tian has broken through to a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even if it is not as good as the Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, it is definitely stronger than the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

Where can they fight!

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said again: "We don't directly break into the Silent Black Sea, when the Endless Heavenly Ancestor leaves the Silent Black Sea, we will dive in again, we only need to pay attention to the dynamics of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor." Without the Silent Black Sea of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, it is a back garden for us. "

"That's right!"

Several Heavenly Ancestors suddenly realized.

For the rest of the year, they waited for their chance.

Finally, this day came.
